# Deepgram Go SDK

> Go SDK for the Deepgram speech-to-text API: prerecorded transcription and live streaming transcription over HTTP, WebSocket, and SageMaker transports. Smart formatting, diarization, language detection, entity detection, intents, sentiment, summarization, topic detection. Runs on Go 1.24+.

## Install

```
go get github.com/deepgram/spec-mock-go-sdk
```

## Quick start

- [README.md](README.md) — install, runnable examples for both transcription packages, auth.
- [pkg/client/listen/v1/prerecorded/example_test.go](pkg/client/listen/v1/prerecorded/example_test.go) — runnable prerecorded examples per method.
- [pkg/client/listen/v1/live/example_test.go](pkg/client/listen/v1/live/example_test.go) — runnable live examples per method.

## Runnable examples (prerecorded)

Every exported method has a matching `Example_*` function in [`example_test.go`](pkg/client/listen/v1/prerecorded/example_test.go):

- `ExampleClient_FromURL` — transcribe a remote URL.
- `ExampleClient_FromFile` — transcribe a local file.
- `ExampleClient_FromStream` — transcribe an `io.Reader`.
- `ExamplePreRecordedTranscriptionOptions` — typed options plus additional query parameters.
- `ExampleWithSageMakerTransport` — use SageMaker for prerecorded transcription.

## Runnable examples (live)

Every exported method has a matching `Example_*` function in [`example_test.go`](pkg/client/listen/v1/live/example_test.go):

- `ExampleClient_Connect` — open a live session.
- `ExampleStream_SendAudio` — push audio bytes.
- `ExampleStream_Recv` — receive typed events.
- `ExampleStream_Finalize` — request final results.
- `ExampleStream_KeepAlive` — keep the session active.
- `ExampleStream_CloseStream` — graceful end-of-audio.
- `ExampleLiveTranscriptionOptions` — typed live options plus additional query parameters.
- `ExampleWithSageMakerBidiTransport` — use SageMaker HTTP/2 bidirectional streaming.

## Tutorials

The [`examples/`](examples) directory has standalone runnable programs for common scenarios: authentication, prerecorded URL/file/callback transcription, live WebSocket streaming, SageMaker transports, advanced options, request options, and error handling.

## Integration tests

- [pkg/client/listen/v1/prerecorded/client_test.go](pkg/client/listen/v1/prerecorded/client_test.go) — `httptest`-driven prerecorded tests for constructor options and query-parameter precedence.
- [pkg/client/listen/v1/live/resilience_test.go](pkg/client/listen/v1/live/resilience_test.go) — live stream send and configuration tests.

- [REGEN.md](REGEN.md) — maintainer-only regeneration instructions.
